_doc: LATTICE Meta-Harness model router config. Edit this file to swap which model handles which task. See meta/harness/MODELS.md for full docs.

claude.notes: Anthropic Claude Code CLI. Used by pixeltable/service/worker.py.

codex.notes: OpenAI Codex CLI. Requires OPENAI_API_KEY or codex login.

copilot.notes: GitHub Copilot via gh extension. Uses your Copilot subscription.

ollama.install: brew install ollama (then: ollama pull qwen2.5-coder:7b)
ollama.notes: Local models, no network, no API cost. Pull models with `ollama pull <name>`.

mlx-lm.install: uv tool install mlx-lm  (then a model auto-downloads on first use)
mlx-lm.notes: Apple MLX text LLMs — Apple Silicon native, faster than Ollama on M-series. See `mlx_lm.manage --scan` for cached models. Browse: https://huggingface.co/mlx-community

mlx-vlm.install: uv tool install mlx-vlm --with torch --with torchvision  (torch is required by Qwen3-VL's video processor even for image-only input)
mlx-vlm.notes: Apple MLX vision-language models. Pass --image <path> when invoking the router. Tested: Qwen3-VL-2B/8B, Gemma-4-26B (multimodal Gemma).

omlx.install: Download from https://github.com/oMLX/oMLX (or App Store) — provides multi-model OpenAI-compatible server for Apple Silicon
omlx.notes: Production-ready local LLM server. `omlx serve <model> --port 8000` exposes an OpenAI-compat API. Can also `omlx launch codex --model X` to wire local models into Codex CLI.

recommended_mlx_models._doc: Apple Silicon native — typically 2-4x faster than Ollama on M-series for equivalent quants. Use `mlx_lm.generate --model <repo>` (auto-downloads on first call).

mlx-community/Hermes-3-Llama-3.1-8B-4bit.use: general purpose, good instruction following — currently cached

mlx-community/Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct-.use: code reasoning — best MLX equivalent of ollama qwen2.5-coder

mlx-community/Qwen2-VL-7B-Instruct-4bit.use: vision-language (mlx-vlm) — drone frames, IFC screenshots, plan-sheet OCR

recommended_bonsai_models._doc: PrismML Ternary Bonsai (1.58-bit weights, group-wise FP16 scaling). Apache 2.0. Native MLX support — no custom build needed. https://huggingface.co/collections/prism-ml/bonsai

prism-ml/Ternary-Bonsai-1.7B-mlx-2bit.use: ultra-fast classification, triage, quick code suggestions — beats Llama 3.2 3B in 1/4 the memory

prism-ml/Ternary-Bonsai-4B-mlx-2bit.use: general reasoning at small footprint — sweet spot for harness fallbacks

prism-ml/Ternary-Bonsai-8B-mlx-2bit.use: primary local model — 75.5 avg benchmark score, half the memory of equivalent 8B FP16, faster than Hermes-8B-4bit
